title: AI
observability.description: Monitor AI usage, costs, latency, and provider health
cache.title: Cache Management
cache.description: View and manage the AI entity categorisation cache
rules.title: Categorisation Rules
rules.description: Browse and manage AI categorisation rules
rules.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this categorisation rule? This action cannot be undone.
rules.inactiveSkipped: Inactive rules are skipped by the matcher.
prompts.title: Prompt Templates
prompts.description: Read-only view of the AI prompt templates used in this application. Prompts are defined in code and cannot be edited here.
prompts.categorisationDesc: Used when a bank transaction cannot be matched to a known entity. Extracts merchant name and spending category from the raw transaction description.
prompts.ruleGenDesc: Proposes reusable tagging rules from a batch of transactions. Rules are stored and applied automatically to future imports.
